winter_ice_fishing_cold.png.description: A bird bundled up in winter clothing is shoveling snow with effort and determination.

winter_icy_sidewalk_salt_umbrella.png.description: A bird holding an umbrella and newspaper while trudging through puddles in wet weather conditions.

winter_skiing_red_scarf.png.description: A bird skiing down a snowy slope while giving a thumbs up, dressed for winter sports.

winter_snow_dumpster_diving_cold.png.description: A bird sits in a wooden box filled with coal during winter, surrounded by snow.

worry.png.description: A bird character in professional attire holding a clipboard with a focused expression.
